title: Tier A3: Port executing-plans
description: Drop 'load plan file' as the source of truth. Loop on bd ready. Blockers become bd defer or a new blocker issue + bd dep add. Resuming a half-done plan in a new session works without reading the plan file.
close_reason: Closed

title: Tier A2: Port subagent-driven-development
description: Replace TodoWrite-driven dispatch with bd ready / bd update --claim. Subagent reads task brief via bd show <id>. Reviewer subagent calls bd close. State now survives compaction and session end.
close_reason: Closed

title: Tier A1: Port using-superpowers
description: Rewrite using-superpowers/SKILL.md so the flowchart node 'Create TodoWrite todo per item' becomes 'bd create per checklist item'. Update the red-flags table to drop TodoWrite references. This is the highest priority because it's the source of the policy conflict that propagates to every session.
close_reason: Closed

title: EPIC: Beads-native rewrite of superpowers skills
description: Port the 14 superpowers SKILL.md files to use bd as the persistence layer instead of TodoWrite and markdown plan files. See plan in conversation history (Tiers A-D) and README.
close_reason: Completed beads-native rewrite epic; all child ports, formulas, CI, and preflight work closed and final preflight passed.

comments.author: Joseph Bongaarts
comments.text: Verification: all child beads are closed; scripts/preflight.sh -> exit 0 after final skill port; remaining ready list contained only this epic.

title: Patch pre-commit hook for missing timeout binary
description: Beads' .beads/hooks/pre-commit looks for the 'timeout' binary but macOS doesn't ship it (coreutils provides 'gtimeout'). When timeout is missing, the hook silently runs without a timeout and can deadlock. Patch the hook to also check for gtimeout, or fall through to a perl-alarm shim. This bit us during bd init in this repo. Consider upstreaming to beads as well.
close_reason: Patched pre-commit hook to use timeout, gtimeout, then a Perl alarm shim before falling back without timeout.

title: Create GitHub remote and decide visibility
description: Run gh repo create jhbongaarts/superpowers-beads with --public or --private depending on user decision. Push initial scaffold + bd workspace + first batch of ported skills.
close_reason: Created public repo at https://github.com/jbongaarts/superpowers-beads; pushed in commit 8956c2a

title: Author beads formulas for superpowers workflows
description: Author 4-5 beads formulas under formulas/ that codify the superpowers workflows: superpowers/feature (brainstorm → spec → plan → tasks → verify → finish), superpowers/bugfix (debug → failing-test → fix → verify), superpowers/skill-authoring (pressure-test → write → green → refactor → commit), superpowers/parallel-burst (proto with N siblings), superpowers/code-review-response (N child issues per feedback item). bd mol pour <name> instantiates the workflow as a graph of issues.
close_reason: Added five discoverable superpowers workflow formulas with docs and validated formula discovery, cook dry-runs, pour dry-run, and plugin preflight.

comments.author: Joseph Bongaarts
comments.text: Added five discoverable .beads/formulas/*.formula.toml workflows plus docs. Verified bd formula list, bd formula show superpowers-feature, bd cook dry-runs for all five formulas, bd mol pour superpowers-feature --dry-run, git diff --check, and ALLOW_IN_PROGRESS=superpowers-beads-noe scripts/preflight.sh.

title: Tier C2: Port finishing-a-development-branch
description: Call bd preflight as the canonical pre-merge checklist. Orphans/stale issues block merge/PR options until resolved.
close_reason: Ported finishing-a-development-branch to require verification plus bd preflight/hygiene checks before integration; verification: claude plugin validate . passed; plugin-specific preflight config follow-up filed as superpowers-beads-isj.1.

comments.author: Joseph Bongaarts
comments.text: Verification: claude plugin validate . -> exit 0; marketplace validation passed. Beads hygiene: bd orphans -> no orphaned issues; bd stale -> no stale issues; bd preflight --check currently uses non-applicable Go/Nix checks for this plugin repo, follow-up filed as superpowers-beads-isj.1.

title: Tier C1: Port verification-before-completion
description: Add explicit rule: do not bd close without showing the verification command output in the same turn. Optionally enforce via a beads pre-close hook.
close_reason: Ported verification-before-completion with beads-native rule to show and record verification output before bd close; verification: claude plugin validate . passed.

comments.author: Joseph Bongaarts
comments.text: Verification: claude plugin validate . -> exit 0; marketplace validation passed.

title: Tier B5: Port requesting-code-review
description: Review summary stored as a comment on the feature issue. Newly-unblocked work surfaces via bd close --suggest-next.
close_reason: Ported requesting-code-review so review summaries are persisted as bd comments, accepted feedback routes through receiving-code-review child tasks, and close --suggest-next surfaces newly unblocked work.

title: Tier B4: Port receiving-code-review
description: Each unresolved feedback item becomes a child task linked to the parent. Evaluations go on as comments (bd comment), not in chat history.
close_reason: Ported receiving-code-review so feedback evaluations are stored as bd comments and accepted unresolved items become child tasks on the parent issue.

title: Tier B3: Port systematic-debugging
description: Open a --type=bug issue at Phase 1; append evidence with bd note; at root-cause, bd remember --key=<topic> so the lesson is reusable across sessions.
close_reason: Ported systematic-debugging to track debugging sessions as bd bug issues, append evidence and hypotheses as notes, and persist reusable root-cause lessons with bd remember.

title: Tier B2: Port brainstorming
description: Final-approval step creates the feature epic in bd with --design and --acceptance populated. Markdown spec becomes optional export.
close_reason: Ported brainstorming to create beads-native feature epics with design and acceptance fields, optional exports, and copied visual companion support files.

title: Tier B1: Port writing-plans
description: Output is an epic + child tasks rather than (or in addition to) a markdown file. Keep markdown as a generated export via bd export / templated bd show so reviewers still get a human-readable artifact.
close_reason: Ported writing-plans as a beads-native epic and child issue planning workflow with optional export guidance.

title: Scaffold superpowers-beads repo

close_reason: Scaffold complete in commit 36724a2

comments.text: Baseline pressure evidence: old dispatching-parallel-agents under the prompt 'coordinate three independent failures' groups domains and calls Task(...) directly, then reviews summaries in chat. It does not require N child beads, bd swarm validate/status/create, atomic claims per worker, or bd close --suggest-next after each return. The port must make beads the coordination and review surface.
